assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes recurring_window with start_time on Saturday and recurrence = "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA" for weekend-only maintenance

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud container clusters update with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence="FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Multiple quarterly exclusions are configured (Q1-Q4) with appropriate date ranges, though the response doesn't explicitly mention the 30-day limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Annual audit exclusion is configured for November with start_time="2024-11-01T00:00:00Z" and end_time="2024-11-30T23:59:59Z"

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades or clarify that maintenance windows only affect auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: No mention of GKE release channels (Stable or Extended) or recommendations for combining them with maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about version drift risks or the security/compliance implications of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods
